children.heading: Appropriate congressional committees
children.label: 1 Appropriate congressional committees
children.text: The term “appropriate congressional committees” means the Committee on Commerce, Science, and Transportation, the Committee on Banking, Housing, and Urban Affairs, and the Committee on Homeland Security and Governmental Affairs of the Senate and the Committee on Homeland Security and the Committee on Transportation and Infrastructure of the House of Representatives.

children.heading: Department
children.label: 2 Department
children.text: The term “Department” means the Department of Homeland Security.

children.heading: Secretary
children.label: 3 Secretary
children.text: The term “Secretary” means the Secretary of Homeland Security.

children.heading: State
children.label: 4 State
children.text: The term “State” means any one of the 50 States, the District of Columbia, Puerto Rico, the Northern Mariana Islands, the Virgin Islands, Guam, American Samoa, and any other territory or possession of the United States.

children.heading: Terrorism
children.label: 5 Terrorism
children.text: The term “terrorism” has the meaning that term has in .section 101 of this title

children.heading: United States
children.label: 6 United States
children.text: The term “United States” means the 50 States, the District of Columbia, Puerto Rico, the Northern Mariana Islands, the Virgin Islands, Guam, American Samoa, and any other territory or possession of the United States.
